Uses of Class
cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotHyperlink

  • Uses of PotHyperlink in cc.quaternion.potshaper

    Methods in cc.quaternion.potshaper that return PotHyperlink
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static PotHyperlink
    PotHyperlink.email(String email)
    Creates a hyperlink that opens the default email client with a new message.
    static PotHyperlink
    PotHyperlink.email(String email, String subject)
    Creates a hyperlink that opens the default email client with a new message, including a subject.
    static PotHyperlink
    PotHyperlink.file(String filePath)
    Creates a hyperlink to a local or network file.
    static PotHyperlink
    PotHyperlink.firstSlide()
    Creates a hyperlink to the first slide of the presentation.
    static PotHyperlink
    PotHyperlink.lastSlide()
    Creates a hyperlink to the last slide of the presentation.
    static PotHyperlink
    PotHyperlink.nextSlide()
    Creates a hyperlink to the next slide relative to the current slide.
    static PotHyperlink
    PotHyperlink.previousSlide()
    Creates a hyperlink to the previous slide relative to the current slide.
    static PotHyperlink
    PotHyperlink.slide(int slideIndex)
    Creates a hyperlink to a specific slide within the same presentation.
    PotHyperlink
    PotHyperlink.tooltip(String tooltip)
    Sets the tooltip text for this hyperlink.
    static PotHyperlink
    PotHyperlink.url(String url)
    Creates a hyperlink to an external URL.

    Method
    Description

    PotAudio.hyperlink(PotHyperlink link)
    Applies a hyperlink to this audio element.

    Attaches a hyperlink to this chart element.
